$comment: OSEC3 template for CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN. Equivalent to dash.cloudflare.com 'Edit Cloudflare Workers' template. Permission group UUIDs are stable per https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/user/tokens/permission_groups (vendor docs cited in scripts/secret-mint/cf-token-mint.ts). Refresh quarterly to detect upstream group renames.
name: edit-cloudflare-workers-osec3-${ISO_DATE}

policies.$comment: All accounts: Worker-related Edit + Account Settings Read
All zones in selected account: Workers Routes Edit
